title: ulmus foliacea var. stricta
intro: Ulmus foliacea var. stricta, also known as the American elm, is a deciduous tree species native to North America, characterized by its distinctive vase-shaped crown and heart-shaped leaves. The medicinal properties of Ulmus foliacea var. stricta include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of the common cold, and support cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Ulmus foliacea var. stricta include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
